case_title: HILLSMAN, CARLYLE L. VS TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HILLSMAN, CARLYLE L. AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. BROWN, MICHAEL LEE, GAR GALLAGHER, RAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2003 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, GAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-10-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-15-2003 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 COMMISSIONER DISCLOSED PAST DONATIONS TO DEFENDANT TNDC. PLAINTIFF SOUGHT ANOTHER HEARING OFFICER WHEN OFFERED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-06-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-10-2003 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 GALLAGHER DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF WANTS A JUDGMENT AGAINST HIM.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILLSMAN, CARLYLE L. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. BROWN, MICHAEL LEE, GAR GALLAGHER, RAY DEFENDANT GALLAGHER FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GALLAGHER, RAY
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-15-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-02-2004 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 RECUSE COMMISSIONER BECKER.
